channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzanian Ambassador Urges Donors to Invest in Long-Term Development Projects
item.description: Dar es Salaam — Zena Ahmed Said, the Chief Secretary of Zanzibar and Tanzanian Ambassador-designate to Saudi Arabia, has made a call to donors, both local and international, to channel their assistanc...

item.title: Warner Bros CEO to Receive Nearly $1 Billion Amid Paramount Takeover
item.description: The CEO of Warner Bros, David Zaslav, is poised to earn over US$700 million (approximately AU$984 million) following the studio's acquisition by Paramount, which outbid Netflix in a US$83 billion deal...

item.title: Sergeant Fannie Nkosi rejects claims of alerting Cat Matlala before raid
item.description: Police sergeant Fannie Nkosi has denied allegations that he warned businessman Vusimusi 'Cat' Matlala of a planned police raid linked to the alleged kidnapping of Jerry Boshoga. Testifying before the ...

item.title: UAV Crashes into House in Rawalpindi's Chaklala Area, No Casualties Reported Amid Pak-Afghan Tensions
item.description: According to security sources, an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) crashed onto a house in the Chaklala area of Rawalpindi early Tuesday morning on March 17, 2026. Thankfully, no loss of life occurred in...

item.title: Raphael Tuju Talks About His Marriage and Family Amid Property Dispute
item.description: Former Cabinet Secretary Raphael Tuju has recently opened up about his personal life and ongoing property issues. Tuju disclosed that after his first divorce, he married a Kalenjin woman, and together...

item.title: Zelensky warns UK parliamentarians of Russia-Iran alliance and urges sustained pressure on Moscow amid Middle East conflict
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky addressed around 60 British MPs and peers in a Westminster committee room, describing the regimes in Russia and Iran as 'brothers in hatred' due to their coopera...

item.title: BJP Plans to Contest 89 of 126 Assembly Seats in Assam for 2026 Elections
item.description: For the upcoming Assam Assembly Elections in 2026, the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has announced its plan to contest in 89 out of the total 126 assembly constituencies across the state. Himanta Biswa...

item.title: Trump criticises Starmer and European leaders over Iran conflict as US insists on acting alone
item.description: Donald Trump criticised UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer in a press conference, branding him 'disappointing' and asserting that he was 'no Churchill'. The US President expressed frustration with Europea...

item.title: Free State school launches anti-bullying drive after viral footage
item.description: Following the circulation of distressing videos on social media depicting pupils being bullied at Ntsu Secondary School in Bethlehem, the Dihlabeng Local Municipality has initiated an anti-bullying ca...

item.title: How Digital Media Amplifies Negative News and Affects Our Attention
item.description: In the current age of the internet, we are constantly exposed to a flood of global crises, even if we are not directly impacted. This phenomenon, often described as a 'polycrisis,' includes interconne...

item.title: DSS arrests suspected gunrunner and recovers 832 rounds of ammunition in Cross River
item.description: Operatives of the Department of State Services (DSS) for Nigeria on Monday arrest one man wey dem suspect say na gunrunner, him name na Kelvin Ebikeniye Dugo, for Ivara Esu Estate, Odukpani Local Gove...

item.title: Khyber Pakhtunkhwa to observe three-day public holiday for Eidul Fitr
item.description: The Khyber Pakhtunkhwa government has officially announced a three-day public holiday on the occasion of Eidul Fitr, covering March 19, 20, and 21. This aligns with the federal government’s declaratio...

item.title: AAP Cleared Excise Policy Case, Kejriwal Challenges BJP for Delhi Assembly Polls
item.description: Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) chief Arvind Kejriwal has declared that his party has successfully cleared what he called the ‘agnipariksha’ following the court ruling in the excise policy case. The trial court...

item.title: Four Mountaineers Rescued After Nearly 10 Days Missing in Ilocos Norte
item.description: Two mountaineers from Metro Manila, aged 28 and 32, together with their two guides, aged 45 and 59, were successfully rescued in Solsona, Ilocos Norte, after being reported missing for almost ten days...

item.title: Residents Struggle as Boikhutso Police Station Remains Closed and Vandalised
item.description: Residents of Boikhutso, a township near Lichtenburg in the North West, are facing increasing crime and inconvenience after their local police satellite station was abandoned. The facility, which once ...

item.title: Police investigate death of man discovered in Coventry park
item.description: Thomas Niven, aged 37, was tragically found dead in a wheelie bin at Cash's Park, Coventry. Police were alerted on Friday evening by a member of the public, and the investigation quickly led to three ...

item.title: Citizen files petition in Islamabad High Court for timely announcement of Shawwal moon sighting by Ruet-e-Hilal Committee
item.description: As Ramadan winds down and people gear up for Eid ul Fitr celebrations across Pakistan, a citizen named Abdullah Shafiq has filed a petition in the Islamabad High Court (IHC). He is asking the court to...

item.title: Key Issues and Influences in Illinois’ 2026 Democratic Primaries
item.description: The Illinois primaries on March 17, 2026, are drawing attention for several key political dynamics. One major focus is the influence of AIPAC, which has spent millions in House races, particularly the...

item.title: Shortage of specialised teachers leaves Grade 10 STEM learners untaught
item.description: Schools across Kenya are struggling with a serious shortage of specialised teachers, particularly in technical subjects under the STEM (Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics) pathway. Grade 10...

item.title: MILF urges prompt appointment of new government peace panel chairman
item.description: COTABATO CITY — The Moro Islamic Liberation Front (MILF) has temporarily paused interactions with its government counterpart in the peace implementing panel following the resignation of retired Army G...
